name: Dexter Public Schools
description_short: DPS Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving Oklahoma State Employees and their families since 1953, offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
DPS Federal Credit Union was established in 1953 to serve the financial needs of Oklahoma State Employees and their families. As a credit union, it operates as a member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit institution, with membership requiring a minimum $5.00 savings account deposit. The organization positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks, emphasizing security, service, and member benefits.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking products including free checking accounts, savings accounts, share certificates, auto loans (as low as 4.44% APR), personal loans (as low as 8.75% APR), and recreational vehicle/boat/motorcycle financing. Members have access to online and mobile banking platforms featuring check mobile deposit, bill pay, debit card controls, balance inquiries, and account management tools. The institution also maintains a network of surcharge-free ATMs accessible to members.

DPS FCU distinguishes itself through membership eligibility tied to Oklahoma State Employee status, creating a defined member base with shared professional backgrounds. The credit union emphasizes digital convenience with features like card-on/off controls through mobile banking, mobile check deposit with daily processing windows, and free bill pay services. As a credit union, member earnings are returned as dividends rather than extracted as shareholder profits.

The organization is straightforward in its operations and transparent about offerings. However, membership is restricted to Oklahoma State Employees and their families, limiting accessibility compared to banks open to the general public. The website provides clear rate information and calculators but limited details on approval timelines, credit requirements, or competitive advantages beyond member-focused service positioning.
services: Free checking accounts with debit card access
Share certificates (CDs) with rates up to 3.09% APY
Auto loans with rates as low as 4.44% APR
Personal loans with rates as low as 8.75% APR
Mobile banking app with check deposit capability
Online banking with bill pay services
Debit card on/off controls through mobile app
Mobile eStatements and check image viewing
pros: Membership-based structure means profits are returned to members as dividends rather than to external shareholders
Auto loans available at 4.44% APR with fast approval process
Mobile check deposit available through app with $5,000 per-item limit
Complete debit card control—ability to turn card on/off instantly through mobile banking
Free checking and free bill pay services for all members
Surcharge-free ATM network access for members
Personal loans available starting at 8.75% APR
cons: Membership restricted to Oklahoma State Employees and their families—not available to general public
Limited physical location information provided on website
Mobile deposit has restrictive processing window (8:15 AM - 3:00 PM business days only) and prohibits third-party checks
Savings account APY is very low at 0.25%, uncompetitive with online banks
Website does not disclose loan approval timeline, credit score requirements, or debt-to-income limits
best_for: Oklahoma State Employees seeking member-owned banking with dividend returns
State employees and families wanting competitive auto loan rates with fast approval
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience and mobile check deposit functionality
Credit union members seeking lower-cost personal loans and recreational vehicle financing
diagnosis: DPS Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma State Employees and their families seeking member-owned banking with competitive loan rates and convenient digital services. The primary caveat is strict membership eligibility—this institution is not accessible to the general public and requires employment status with the Oklahoma State government.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Dexter Public Schools — Dexter, MO Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: Dexter Public Schools — NCUA-insured credit union in Dexter, MO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
